text:
Type Code (10th Occurrence) ― January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: Monthly values for the 10th of up to 10 waiver type codes. There are separate variables for each of the 
12 months during the year. The last two digits of this variable indicate the month. 

SHORT NAME: WVR_TYPE_CD_10_01 
WVR_TYPE_CD_10_02 
WVR_TYPE_CD_10_03 
WVR_TYPE_CD_10_04 
WVR_TYPE_CD_10_05 
WVR_TYPE_CD_10_06 
 WVR_TYPE_CD_10_07 
WVR_TYPE_CD_10_08 
WVR_TYPE_CD_10_09 
WVR_TYPE_CD_10_10 
WVR_TYPE_CD_10_11
